sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Currently cross 1 is selected (G border)
# Let me try clicking cross 2, then cross 4 (the one at row 25, col 43)
# Cross 4 boundary: [[24, 42], [24, 43], [25, 44], [26, 44], [27, 43], [27, 42], [26, 41], [25, 41]]
# Center around row 25-26, col 42-43

# First click cross 2
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 25}])
print("After cross 2:", 'G' in {n['color'] for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']})

# Now click cross 4
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 25, 'col': 43}])
print("After cross 4:", 'G' in {n['color'] for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']})

seg = current_frame.segmentation
colors = {}
for n in seg['nodes']:
    c = n['color']
    colors[c] = colors.get(c, 0) + 1
print("Colors:", colors)

# Check if level completed
print("Level completed:", last_action_result.get('level_completed', False))
print("Done:", last_action_result.get('done', False))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
